name: Do I need lawyer for back workers comp in Salt Lake City?
description: Yes for disputes—boosts payout, handles appeals[1].

mainEntity.name: Do I need lawyer for back workers comp in Salt Lake City?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes for disputes—boosts payout, handles appeals[1].
acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, for denials, trials, or max value—self-reps lose benefits.** 20-33% more recovery typical[1]. **Key factors:** Complexity of causation, insurer fights. **Practical guidance:** Free consults common, no win no fee. Utah Labor Commission hearings need prep[1]. **Highly recommended.**
